query.disease: hemorrhagic disorder due to a constitutional thrombocytopenia

data.title: Efficacy and Safety of a Novel Tetravalent Dengue Vaccine in Healthy Children and Adolescents Aged 9 to 16 Years in Latin America
data.country: Colombia, Brazil, Mexico, Honduras, Puerto Rico
data.brief_summary:
The aim of the study was to assess the efficacy of Sanofi Pasteur's CYD dengue vaccine in preventing symptomatic virologically-confirmed dengue cases for dengue-endemic areas of Latin America.

Primary Objective:

To assess the efficacy of CYD dengue vaccine after 3 vaccinations at 0, 6, and 12 months in preventing symptomatic virologically-confirmed dengue (VCD) cases, regardless of the severity, due to any of the four serotypes in children and adolescents aged 9 to 16 years at the time of incl
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Aged 9 to 16 years on the day of inclusion and resident of the site zone
* Participant in good health, based on medical history and physical examination
* Assent form or informed consent form has been signed and dated by the participant (based on local regulations), and inform
endpoints: Number of Symptomatic Virologically Confirmed Dengue (VCD) Cases Due to Any Serotype During the Active Phase Post-dose 3 Following Injection With Either CYD Dengue Vaccine or a Placebo
